definition.name: def-square-hole
definition.definition: Let P be the spectral idempotent and A=Im P the near-fixed algebra. For r in A, the square hole is q_r := P(r^2)-r^2 in Ker P, the failure of A to be closed under the ambient squaring. More generally the product hole of r,s in A is h_{r,s}:=r o s - P(r o s) in Ker P (so q_r = -h_{r,r}).
